properties.injury_desc: Small wound on top of plastron, healing wells expelling bone present,

Injuries fresh and indicate shark mauling. 
Unable to determine if the turtle was dead or alive when attacked. Carapace badly delaminated when inspected indicating the turtle may have been dead when attacked.
Left rear flipper missing and marking around front left flipper.  May have had rope around them?

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes:
Sent to Baffle Creek rehab. Tina 
Under Cairns permit

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy barnacles coverage of carapace, barnacles and soft tissue
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Rescued and dry docked overnight by TITR awaiting transport to AZWH Fri, 7/5/26

properties.injury_desc: Indent and change in colouration around neck indicate turtle may have had an entanglement which is no longer present.  There is also an open wound in the same area which may indicate an entanglement of rope which rubbed on the area.
